matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Education (Mathematics Education) is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The Mathematics Education route is for anyone with a research or professional interest in mathematics education at any level of education (primary, secondary, or tertiary), wanting to undertake advanced study in a world-class setting. The Mathematics Education route is taught by a specialist team, and its student cohort is drawn primarily from UK-based professionals who continue in their full-time posts while taking the course part-time
